title: Recovering a Forgotten Password
drDigitalIntro: Forgot your password? Don't panic — every website has a 'Forgot Password' link. Click it, enter your email address, and they'll send you a link to reset your password. Check your email spam folder if the reset email doesn't arrive in a few minutes. If you're locked out of your email account itself, look for the account recovery option using a phone number or backup email. A password manager prevents this problem.

playgroundTask.goal: You practiced the password recovery process

steps.say: Go to the Login tab — we need to log in but forgot the password.
Type your email: 'drdigital@example.com' in the username field.
Type a new password you'll remember: 'NewPass#2025!'.
Log in with your new password.

drDigitalSuccess: Password reset complete! Forgot Password + email reset = back in your account.
drDigitalHint: In real life, click 'Forgot Password', enter your email, and follow the reset link.
